title: Subitems slack notifications
excerpt: I want to be able to send slack notifications every time a subitem has been completed. Currently this isnt possible because the slack integration is only for items

posts.author: RayaSlavova (Raya Slavova)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to be able to send slack notifications every time a subitem has been completed. Currently this isnt possible because the slack integration is only for items

posts.author: ReturnOfTheMac (M-A C)
posts.cookedHtml:
Same request. Please make notifications for subItems possible.
My teammates write updates in conversations and it’s not showing up in Slack.
Thank you

posts.author: asharma (Ankur Sharma - Upscale (Part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Roya and M-A C, we recently launched an app called Slack IntegratePlus for monday.com that let’s you do exactly that (and so much more)! Could you please give it a try? Thank you!

posts.author: KarelR (Karel)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 on this please. Seen posts from 2021 requesting this..
